seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Herman Binge - Marinda Kook
seo.description: This week Marinda cooks with a long-time friend, Herman Binge. Don't miss it. Tuesday 17:30 on channel 147.

html:
Herman Binge has walked a long road with me and Johann. He and Johann were roommates at Stellenbosch. Many evenings they serenaded together outside the residences. And when I met Johann, Herman became part of my life too. He even gave the toast to the two of us at our wedding in 1980. So he and Joanie Combrink became an inseparable part of our circle of friends.

Herman is an introvert and used to being on the other side of the cameras. It took some persuading to get him into my kitchen. I really appreciated that he cooked with me. We made a few of his favourite dishes.

Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
